summary: Bug Fix Verified: Burning Session double counting issue fixed. Frontend was adding burn_per_second to liveBurnAmount every second, causing inflated values (28,000+ PRC shown when actual was ~2,900 PRC). Fix: Disabled frontend live counter, now shows server total_burned_lifetime value only with 10s refresh. All 36 tests pass (20 backend + 16 frontend).
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user UID: cbdf46d7-7d66-4d43-8495-e1432a2ab071
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Frontend no longer has live counter that increments burn amount every second. Server value (total_burned_lifetime) is displayed directly and refreshed every 10 seconds. Current test user has ~3,000 PRC burned (correct value) and ~27,000 PRC balance.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Burning Session showing wrong count - counter was double counting
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend was adding burn_per_second to liveBurnAmount every second, while server also applies burn on each API call
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Disabled frontend live counter, now shows server value only with 10s refresh

features_tested.days_until_minimum: PASS - Correctly calculates days until 10,000 PRC reached
features_tested.burn_application: PASS - Burns are applied when API is called
features_tested.total_burned_lifetime: PASS - Tracks cumulative burned amount correctly

features_tested.frontend_live_status: PASS - Shows LIVE badge when burning active
features_tested.frontend_burn_rates_display: PASS - Shows Per Hour and Per Day burn rates
features_tested.frontend_no_double_counting: PASS - Value does not increase rapidly
